profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordHelp: Choose a strong password with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
profile.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated successfully.
profile.biometricUnsupported: Your device does not support biometric authentication
profile.biometricNotEnrolled: No biometrics enrolled. Please set up Face ID or fingerprint in your device settings first
profile.biometricEnableFailed: Biometric verification failed. Biometric login was not enabled.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
profile.passwordTooWeak: Add numbers or symbols to strengthen
profile.dataUsageDesc: Manage how your data is used
profile.lowDataModeDesc: Reduce image quality to save mobile data
profile.shareAnalyticsDesc: Help us improve by sharing crash reports and usage data
profile.personalizationDesc: Allow us to suggest services based on your activity
profile.clearCacheDesc: Free up space by clearing local search history and temporary files
profile.clearCacheSuccess: Search history and cache cleared successfully.
profile.downloadDataDesc: Request a copy of your account activity, chats, and profile data
profile.downloadDataSuccess: Your data request has been received. A download link will be sent to your email ({{email}}) within 24 hours.
profile.exportDataSub: We will prepare a ZIP archive of your data and email it to:
profile.clearCacheConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to clear search history and local image cache? This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMsg: Warning: This will permanently delete your account, bookings, wallet balance, and profile. This cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
profile.deleteSuccess: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted.
profile.providerUnavailableDesc: This application is missing provider details. Please refresh the task and try again.
profile.noReviews: No reviews yet for this professional.
profile.reviewFallback: Successfully completed task with excellent feedback!
profile.bookBeforeMessaging: You need to book this provider before messaging them.
profile.verificationChooseSubtitle: Select the official identity document you'd like to submit. Make sure it is valid and not expired.
profile.verificationSecurityNote: Your documents are encrypted and stored securely. They are only used for identity verification and will not be shared with third parties.
profile.verificationSelectBody: Please select an identity document type to continue.
profile.chatClosedBanner: This chat has closed because the booking is completed.
profile.boostSubtitle: Get up to 5x more jobs by boosting your profile!
profile.boostConfirmDesc: {{coins}} coins will be deducted from your wallet balance.
profile.unlockConfirmDesc: 2 coins will be deducted from your wallet to unlock this provider's phone number.
profile.insufficientCoins: Insufficient coins. Please top up your wallet.

profileDetail.galleryPermission: Please allow access to your gallery.
profileDetail.imageUploadFailed: Could not upload image. Please try again.
profileDetail.profileChangeBody: You are changing your {{fields}}. These can only be changed once every 30 days. Name changes also require manual verification. Continue?
profileDetail.becomeProviderBody: Switch your account to provider mode and start receiving tasks from clients. Your existing information will be used automatically.
profileDetail.welcomeWorkModeBody: You are now in provider mode. To start receiving jobs, please complete your professional details.
profileDetail.providerModeDone: You are now in provider mode. Your profile is live for clients to discover.
profileDetail.switchToClientBody: Your provider profile will be hidden from the marketplace, but you can switch back anytime.
profileDetail.clientModeDone: You are now browsing as a client. Your provider profile is saved and can be reactivated at any time.
profileDetail.profileIntegrationsBody: Link your work accounts and show clients more proof of your experience.
profileDetail.bioPrompt: Add a strong bio that explains your experience, the services you offer, and why clients should choose you.
profileDetail.certificationsHelp: Listing certifications can help prove your knowledge.
profileDetail.describeWork: Describe relevant work that helps clients trust your profile.
profileDetail.personalProfileHelp: This profile helps providers know who they are working with. Add your location, contact details, and a short note about the type of services you usually need.
profileDetail.postedTasksHelp: Your active and completed tasks appear in My Tasks.
profileDetail.realReviewsHelp: Real reviews from completed tasks will appear here.
profileDetail.newPasswordOptional: New Password (Leave blank to keep same)

workProfile.completeWorkDetails: Complete your work details after switching so clients can find and trust your profile.
workProfile.searchSkillsPlaceholder: Type to search - matches appear below
workProfile.keepTyping: Keep typing to search the catalogue.
workProfile.noSkills: No skills yet - search above or add your own.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Search the FAQ or contact support below.
help.footNote: Fixam Support is available Monday - Saturday, 8 AM - 8 PM WAT.
help.qPostTask: How do I post a task?
help.aPostTask: Tap Create Task from the home screen or menu. Add the title, description, location and budget, then submit it for review.
help.aPayment: Fixam connects clients and providers. Payment is handled after the service according to the agreed terms.
help.aVerified: Professionals complete identity checks with documents and a live selfie. Certificates can improve trust.
help.aCancel: Yes, you can cancel before a professional is assigned. After assignment, contact support if you need help.
help.qCoins: What is the Fixam coin system?
help.aCoins: Fixam credits help providers unlock opportunities and manage job requests.
help.qReport: How do I report an issue?
help.aReport: Open the task or contact support from the Help Center. We will review the issue.
help.qBecomeVerified: How do I become a verified professional?
help.aBecomeVerified: Go to Settings > Verification, upload your document, and complete the selfie step.

invite.title: Invite Friends & Earn Credits
invite.subtitle: Invite a friend and earn 1 credit when they join Fixam and verify their identity.
invite.step2: They sign up and verify their identity
invite.step3: You both receive 1 credit after their verification is approved
invite.shareMessage: Join me on Fixam! Use my referral code {{code}} so we both earn 1 credit when your profile identity gets verified. Download here: https://fixam.app/download

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what to improve or what is not working well.
feedback.sent: Your feedback has been sent to Fixam.

deleteAccountDetails.title: Delete Account
deleteAccountDetails.subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Please read the warnings below carefully before proceeding.
deleteAccountDetails.warning1: All your personal data and profile information will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccountDetails.warning2: Your active bookings will be cancelled.
deleteAccountDetails.warning3: Your wallet balance will be lost.
deleteAccountDetails.warning4: You will not be able to recover your account.
deleteAccountDetails.understand: I understand that this is permanent and cannot be reversed.
deleteAccountDetails.checkConfirm: You must check the confirmation box before proceeding.
deleteAccountDetails.confirmSubtitle: Enter your password to confirm account deletion
